chapter_title.en: Chapter on Those Who Spend the Nights of Mina in Mecca

text: 3007 - رَوَى اِبْنُ مُسْكَانَ عَنْ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ نَاجِيَةَ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : سَأَلْتُهُ عَمَّنْ بَاتَ لَيَالِيَ مِنًى بِمَكَّةَ فَقَالَ «عَلَيْهِ ثَلاَثَةٌ مِنَ اَلْغَنَمِ يَذْبَحُهُنَّ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3007 - Ibn Maskan narrated from Ja’far ibn Najiyah, from Abu Abdullah (as):
I asked him about someone who spends the nights of Mina in Mecca.
Imam (as) replied: "He must offer three sheep as a sacrifice."
